scripts.clean: corepack pnpm -r --if-present clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const names=new Set(['node_modules','dist','coverage','.turbo','playwright-report','test-results']); function walk(dir){ for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})) { const full=path.join(dir, entry.name); if (entry.isDirectory() && (names.has(entry.name) || entry.name.endsWith('.egg-info'))) fs.rmSync(full,{recursive:true,force:true}); else if (entry.isDirectory() && !entry.name.startsWith('.git')) walk(full); } } walk(process.cwd());"
